reason: Replace the legacy Comoros PAYE shortcut with one reviewed CGI 2023 statutory-reference contract. The shared engine annualizes remuneration, permits only a user-supplied approved pension or social contribution capped at 6%, applies the standard 30% professional-expense deduction, and calculates IRPP through the Article 97 annual bands. No employer contribution or unsupported current-year rate claim is modeled.

fixtureDeltas.reason: The baseline now applies the Article 97 annual bands after the 30% professional-expense deduction and assumes no optional approved employee contribution unless the user supplies one.
The high-income fixture now reaches the Article 97 top marginal band after the statutory 30% professional-expense deduction while preserving decimal input handling.
The zero-income baseline remains zero under the reviewed CGI 2023 contract.
